I have problems on -STABLE, see: 

===>  Building for xlifegame-1.12 
rm -f xlifegame 
cc -o xlifegame       -L/usr/X11R6/lib  -lX11 -g    -lxpg4  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/X11R6/lib 
/usr/lib/crt1.o: In function `_start':
